Hey what's going on everyone, if you are selling hybrid and you are doing non-free ads, this is probably the best setup for you so that you can set up $1000 plus sale. Alright, so the goal here is to get this done in under 6 minutes. Average will be about 10. The context schedule is listed below but more or less it's going to be a volume game just like it is normally. Just obviously make sure that you are using Scourge and Urgency, take notes on the phone call and ask, like here's the list of questions that you or your caller can go through. So as usual, name, never say is this name or can I speak to names, just be like Julie, wait for response, it's Alex, wait for response or like an inquisitory tone. From DC Fitness Brentwood, 6 week challenge, you signed up for our Facebook? Right I'm sure you saw that you couldn't schedule a phone call and the reason why is because we sold out of the program. Good news is we're actually open up two more spots and you're next on the list. Wait for the reply. Mind you, if you don't have the sold out page on your thank you page you can just skip to the next piece. This is something that Dylan used and this is actually part of our original program but that a lot of gyms got confused by that concept so if that is not confusing to you, you make your thank you page not a schedule page and it just says sold out so sorry we'll contact you if we open up any more spots and then this way you have automatic scarcity and positioning. So next in the script, so I'm actually taking this call on behalf of Dylan. So we're going to be talking about our transformation specialists and who you'll be meeting with. It's a one on one coaching that doesn't want to watch your programs. We don't take every client so I just want to chat with you and see if it's going to be a good fit. Alright wait. Okay cool so what are your goals? Are you trying to lose weight? Body fat or both? If they say body fat or both, you say where do you store your body fat? Is it just on your back or side? They'll tell you an answer and you're like cool can you pinch or can you grab it? Got it. Okay because now at this point they're literally viscerally holding onto their fat. So if it's weight you say what's your current weight and goal? Why now? Cool. So why is losing 25 pounds and getting into your bikini important to you? And then they'll tell you why in a little bit deeper and you say cool what's stopping you from getting results on your own? And they're going to tell you this is important because that way they're going to know that you coach. Okay if we can get you very quickly to hit your goal in the next six weeks how long would you want to wait before making that happen? Now if they say anything but ASAP just say like you know what we're really looking for people who are ready to get started right away. So and they might say oh no sorry I misunderstood like yes I'm ready to get started. But if they say they're not really get started then just let them go and say you know wish you the best maybe we can follow up with you later. And then after that you're like great based on what you told me sounds like you could be a good fit for the program. I like to set up a console with Dylan. They're the ones who ultimately decide who does the program, what time can you come in today? We only have two spots left like I said the program's about to close. If there's trouble booking or if they say they can't find a time to say wait what time are you planning on working out? And then they will answer and you're like great so I'm going to text you so if they say what time are you, if they have or are having trouble you say what time are you planning on working out. When they tell you that time then just use that time. So it's like well I was planning on working out in the afternoon. Cool like what time? Six? Cool can you do six today or can you do six tomorrow because if they're planning on working out then they have a time in their head that they could come. And if they're like well I wasn't planning on working out because someone always has a time so they just are being difficult.
